playbook.intent: One product bet travels from approved RFC to live production behind feature flag with telemetry + on-call ready. All handoffs (PM brief → BA reqs → Architect design → Dev implementation → QA verification → DevOps deploy → PdM rollout) are auditable. Output: shipped feature, runbook, dashboards, post-launch review scheduled.
playbook.scope: One product bet travels from approved RFC to live production behind feature flag with telemetry + on-call ready. All handoffs (PM brief → BA reqs → Architect design → Dev implementation → QA verification → DevOps deploy → PdM rollout) are auditable. Output: shipped feature, runbook, dashboards, post-launch review scheduled.

success-criteria.criterion: All 6 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: RFC
stage.intent: Decide the design before any prod code.

tasks.task: Write the RFC: problem, proposed design, alternatives, tradeoffs
Review with architecture + affected teams; collect comments
Resolve every blocking comment in writing

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when RFC is approved with no blocking comments open.

stage.name: Spec & Tasks
stage.intent: Translate the RFC into shippable tasks.

tasks.task: Convert RFC into spec.md with acceptance criteria
Break into tasks ≤2 days each with owners
Plan the rollout (feature flag, migration, rollback)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every task has a clear AC and a named owner.

stage.name: Build
stage.intent: Implement against the spec; PRs go through review.

tasks.task: Open PRs against a feature branch; review with tests

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every spec AC is implemented and PR-reviewed.

stage.name: Test in Production-like Env

tasks.task: Run integration and load tests against staging
Sign off the staging report with QA + on-call

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when staging passes AND rollback drill ran clean.

stage.name: Rollout
stage.intent: Ship behind a flag, watch the dashboards.

tasks.task: Roll out to 1%, then 10%, then 100% on the flag
Watch error/latency/business dashboards at each step
Pause or roll back on any threshold breach

stage.decision-gate: Advance when feature is at 100% with green dashboards for 24h.

stage.name: Post-Launch
stage.intent: Close the loop or kill the feature.

tasks.task: Measure against the RFC's success metrics
Run a blameless retro if any incident occurred

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written keep/iterate/kill decision.
